---
title: "Abstracts"
page-layout: full
---

<style type="text/css">
.tg  {border-collapse:collapse;border-color:#ccc;border-spacing:0;}
.tg td{background-color:#fff;border-color:#ccc;border-style:solid;border-width:0px;color:#333;
  font-family:Arial, sans-serif;font-size:14px;overflow:hidden;padding:10px 5px;word-break:normal;vertical-align: top;}
.tg th{background-color:#f0f0f0;border-color:#ccc;border-style:solid;border-width:0px;color:#333;
  font-family:Arial, sans-serif;font-size:14px;font-weight:bold;overflow:hidden;padding:10px 5px;word-break:normal;}
.tg .tg-0pky{border-color:inherit;text-align:left;vertical-align:top}
.tg .tg-btxf{background-color:#f9f9f9;border-color:inherit;text-align:left;vertical-align:top}
.tg .tg-0lax{text-align:left;vertical-align:top}
</style>

```{ojs}
//| echo: false

MathJax = {
  const MathJax = await require('https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/mathjax@4/tex-svg.js')
    .catch(() => window.MathJax)
  return MathJax
}


wm= window['MathJax'] = {
  tex: {
    inlineMath: {'[+]': [['$', '$'], ['\\(', '\\)']]}
  },
  output: {
        font: 'mathjax-fira',
        displayOverflow: 'scroll'
  }
};



//file = FileAttachment("talks.xlsx").xlsx() 
//data = file.sheet("talks", {range:"A1:G21",headers: true})

// data = [
//   {Name: "Alice", Affiliation: "University A", Title: "Talk on $x^2$"},
//   {Name: "Bob", Affiliation: "University B", Title: "Talk on $y^2$"}
// ]


dataf = FileAttachment("abstract-dmd2026.tsv").tsv()

data=dataf.sort((a, b) => a.Apellidos.localeCompare(b.Apellidos))

function isEmptyOrSpaces(str){
    return str === null || str.match(/^ *$/) !== null;
}


muestra = function(data){
var code = "<div id='talks'>"
var day=""
data.forEach(d => {
if (!isEmptyOrSpaces(d.abstract)) {
    //code = code +"<p  id='"+d.id+ "'>" + d.Authors+ ", <em>" + d.Title + " </em></p>"
    code = code + "<details id='"+d.id+"'><summary>"+ d.Authors+ ", <em>" + d.Title + " </em></summary><p>" + d.abstract + "</p></details>"
}else{
    code = code +"<p  id='"+d.id+ "'> &#9655; " + d.Authors+ ", <em>" + d.Title + " </em></p>"
}
code = code + "</div>"
});

return code
}

muestra_lista = function(data){
var code = "<div id='talks'><ol>"
var day=""
data.forEach(d => {
if (!isEmptyOrSpaces(d.abstract)) {
    //code = code +"<p  id='"+d.id+ "'>" + d.Authors+ ", <em>" + d.Title + " </em></p>"
    code = code + "<li id='"+d.id+"'>"+ d.Authors+ ", <em>" + d.Title + " </em>\n<p>" + d.abstract + "</p></li>\n"
}else{
    code = code +"<li id='"+d.id+ "'>" + d.Authors+ ", <em>" + d.Title + " </em></li>"
}
});
code = code + "</ol></div>"

return code
}


//html`${data.map(d => html`<p>${d.Name} ${d.Affiliation} ${d.Title}</p>`)}`

//html`<p>${data[0].Title.val}</p>`

// blah ="$x^2$"

// ble = data[0].Title

// blu = ble + " $x^2$"

// example = html`${blah}`

// ex = html`${blu}`

listaid = dataf.map(d => d.id)

//listaid

// Use the following code to generate the table structure for the schedule. You can replace the content of the cells with the appropriate information for each session and talk.
// <colgroup>
//    <col span="1" style="width: 15%;">
//    <col span="1" style="width: 40%;">
//    <col span="1" style="width: 40%;">
// </colgroup>

monday = `
<table class="tg">
    <colgroup>
       <col span="1" style="width: 15%;">
       <col span="1" style="width: 40%;">
       <col span="1" style="width: 40%;">
    </colgroup>

<thead>
  <tr>
    <th class="tg-0pky">29/06/2026</th>
    <th class="tg-0pky">Room F1</th>
    <th class="tg-0pky">Room F2</th>
  </tr></thead>
<tbody>
  <tr>
    <td class="tg-btxf">08:15 - 08:55</td>
    <td class="tg-btxf">Registration: Hall Faculty of Science</td>
    <td class="tg-btxf"></td>
  </tr>
  <tr>
    <td class="tg-0pky">09:00 - 09:15</td>
    <td class="tg-0pky">Opening</td>
    <td class="tg-0pky"></td>
  </tr>
  <tr>
    <td class="tg-btxf">09:15 - 10:15</td>
    <td class="tg-btxf">Plenary Talk: {91}</td>
    <td class="tg-btxf"></td>
  </tr>
  <tr>
    <td class="tg-0pky">10:15 - 10:45</td>
    <td class="tg-0pky">Coffee break - Hall</td>
    <td class="tg-0pky"></td>
  </tr>
  <tr>
    <td class="tg-btxf"></td>
    <td class="tg-btxf"><strong>Session 1.A</strong></td>
    <td class="tg-btxf"><strong>Session 1.B</strong></td>
  </tr>
  <tr>
    <td class="tg-0pky">10:45 - 11:05</td>
    <td class="tg-0pky">{50}</td>
    <td class="tg-0pky">{10}</td>
  </tr>
  <tr>
    <td class="tg-btxf">11:05 - 11:25</td>
    <td class="tg-btxf">{24}</td>
    <td class="tg-btxf">{45}</td>
  </tr>
  <tr>
    <td class="tg-0pky">11:25 - 11:45</td>
    <td class="tg-0pky">{62}</td>
    <td class="tg-0pky">{68}</td>
  </tr>
  <tr>
    <td class="tg-btxf">11:45 - 12:00</td>
    <td class="tg-btxf">Short break</td>
    <td class="tg-btxf"></td>
  </tr>
  <tr>
    <td class="tg-0pky"></td>
    <td class="tg-0pky"><strong>Session 2.A</strong></td>
    <td class="tg-0pky"><strong>Session 2.B</strong></td>
  </tr>
  <tr>
    <td class="tg-btxf">12:00 - 12:20</td>
    <td class="tg-btxf">{15}</td>
    <td class="tg-btxf">{20}</td>
  </tr>
  <tr>
    <td class="tg-0pky">12:20 - 12:40</td>
    <td class="tg-0pky">{25}</td>
    <td class="tg-0pky">{22}</td>
  </tr>
  <tr>
    <td class="tg-btxf">12:40 - 13:00</td>
    <td class="tg-btxf">{41}</td>
    <td class="tg-btxf">{70}</td>
  </tr>
  <tr>
    <td class="tg-0pky">13:00 - 15:00</td>
    <td class="tg-0pky">Lunch (self-arranged)</td>
    <td class="tg-0pky"></td>
  </tr>
  <tr>
    <td class="tg-btxf">15:00 - 16:00</td>
    <td class="tg-btxf">Plenary talk: {92}</td>
    <td class="tg-btxf"></td>
  </tr>
  <tr>
    <td class="tg-0pky">16:00 - 16:30</td>
    <td class="tg-0pky">Coffee break - Hall</td>
    <td class="tg-0pky"></td>
  </tr>
  <tr>
    <td class="tg-btxf"></td>
    <td class="tg-btxf"><strong>Session 3.A</strong></td>
    <td class="tg-btxf"><strong>Session 3.B</strong></td>
  </tr>
  <tr>
    <td class="tg-0pky">16:30 - 16:50</td>
    <td class="tg-0pky">{32}</td>
    <td class="tg-0pky">{12}</td>
  </tr>
  <tr>
    <td class="tg-btxf">16:50 - 17:10</td>
    <td class="tg-btxf">{38}</td>
    <td class="tg-btxf">{57}</td>
  </tr>
  <tr>
    <td class="tg-0pky">17:10 - 18:00</td>
    <td class="tg-0pky">Poster session - Hall</td>
    <td class="tg-0pky"></td>
  </tr>
  <tr>
    <td class="tg-btxf">18:00 - 18:30</td>
    <td class="tg-btxf">Business meeting</td>
    <td class="tg-btxf"></td>
  </tr>
</tbody></table>
`


tuesday= `
<table class="tg">
    <colgroup>
       <col span="1" style="width: 15%;">
       <col span="1" style="width: 40%;">
       <col span="1" style="width: 40%;">
    </colgroup>

<thead>
  <tr>
    <th class="tg-0lax"><span style="font-weight:bold">30/06/2026</span></th>
    <th class="tg-0lax"><span style="font-weight:bold">Room F1</span></th>
    <th class="tg-0lax"><span style="font-weight:bold">Room F2</span></th>
  </tr></thead>
<tbody>
  <tr>
    <td class="tg-0lax"><span style="font-weight:normal">09:15 - 10:15</span></td>
    <td class="tg-0lax" colspan="2">Plenary Talk: {94}</td>
  </tr>
  <tr>
    <td class="tg-0lax"><span style="font-weight:normal">10:15 - 10:45</span></td>
    <td class="tg-0lax" colspan="2">Coffee break - Hall</td>
  </tr>
  <tr>
    <td class="tg-0lax"></td>
    <td class="tg-0lax"><span style="font-weight:bold">Session 4.A</span></td>
    <td class="tg-0lax"><span style="font-weight:bold">Session 4.B</span></td>
  </tr>
  <tr>
    <td class="tg-0lax">10:45 - 11:05</td>
    <td class="tg-0lax">{8}</td>
    <td class="tg-0lax">{27}</td>
  </tr>
  <tr>
    <td class="tg-0lax">11:05 - 11:25</td>
    <td class="tg-0lax">{55}</td>
    <td class="tg-0lax">{29}</td>
  </tr>
  <tr>
    <td class="tg-0lax">11:25 - 11: 45</td>
    <td class="tg-0lax">{59}</td>
    <td class="tg-0lax">{49}</td>
  </tr>
  <tr>
    <td class="tg-0lax"><span style="font-weight:normal">11:45 - 12:00</span></td>
    <td class="tg-0lax" colspan="2"><span style="font-weight:normal">Short break</span></td>
  </tr>
  <tr>
    <td class="tg-0lax"></td>
    <td class="tg-0lax"><span style="font-weight:bold">Session 5.A</span></td>
    <td class="tg-0lax"><span style="font-weight:bold">Session 5.B</span></td>
  </tr>
  <tr>
    <td class="tg-0lax">12:00 - 12:20</td>
    <td class="tg-0lax">{31}</td>
    <td class="tg-0lax">{35}</td>
  </tr>
  <tr>
    <td class="tg-0lax">12:20 - 12:40</td>
    <td class="tg-0lax">{63}</td>
    <td class="tg-0lax">{60}</td>
  </tr>
  <tr>
    <td class="tg-0lax">12:40 - 13:00</td>
    <td class="tg-0lax">{48}</td>
    <td class="tg-0lax">{44}</td>
  </tr>
  <tr>
    <td class="tg-0lax"><span style="font-weight:normal">13:00 - 13:10</span></td>
    <td class="tg-0lax" colspan="2"><span style="font-weight:normal">Group photo</span></td>
  </tr>
  <tr>
    <td class="tg-0lax"><span style="font-weight:normal">13:10 - 15:00</span></td>
    <td class="tg-0lax" colspan="2">Lunch (self-arranged)</td>
  </tr>
  <tr>
    <td class="tg-0lax"><span style="font-weight:normal">15:00 - 16:00</span></td>
    <td class="tg-0lax" colspan="2"><span style="font-weight:normal">Ramon Lull prize talk</span></td>
  </tr>
  <tr>
    <td class="tg-0lax"><span style="font-weight:normal">16:00 - 16:30</span></td>
    <td class="tg-0lax" colspan="2"><span style="font-weight:normal">Coffee break</span></td>
  </tr>
  <tr>
    <td class="tg-0lax"></td>
    <td class="tg-0lax"><span style="font-weight:bold">Session 6.A</span></td>
    <td class="tg-0lax"><span style="font-weight:bold">Session 6.B</span></td>
  </tr>
  <tr>
    <td class="tg-0lax">16:30 - 16:50</td>
    <td class="tg-0lax">{52}</td>
    <td class="tg-0lax">{2}</td>
  </tr>
  <tr>
    <td class="tg-0lax">16:50 - 17:10</td>
    <td class="tg-0lax">{56}</td>
    <td class="tg-0lax">{65}</td>
  </tr>
  <tr>
    <td class="tg-0lax"><span style="font-weight:normal">18:30 - 19:30</span></td>
    <td class="tg-0lax" colspan="2"><span style="font-weight:normal">Excursion: Math walk</span></td>
  </tr>
  <tr>
    <td class="tg-0lax"><span style="font-weight:normal">20:30 - 22:30</span></td>
    <td class="tg-0lax" colspan="2"><span style="font-weight:normal">Gala dinner</span></td>
  </tr>
</tbody></table>
`

wednesday= `
<table class="tg">
    <colgroup>
       <col span="1" style="width: 15%;">
       <col span="1" style="width: 40%;">
       <col span="1" style="width: 40%;">
    </colgroup>

<thead>
  <tr>
    <th class="tg-0lax"><span style="font-weight:bold">01/07/2026</span></th>
    <th class="tg-0lax"><span style="font-weight:bold">Room F1</span></th>
    <th class="tg-0lax"><span style="font-weight:bold">Room F2</span></th>
  </tr></thead>
<tbody>
  <tr>
    <td class="tg-0lax"><span style="font-weight:normal">09:30 - 10:30</span></td>
    <td class="tg-0lax" colspan="2">Plenary Talk: {93}</td>
  </tr>
  <tr>
    <td class="tg-0lax"><span style="font-weight:normal">10:30 - 11:00</span></td>
    <td class="tg-0lax" colspan="2"><span style="font-weight:normal">Coffee break</span></td>
  </tr>
  <tr>
    <td class="tg-0lax"></td>
    <td class="tg-0lax"><span style="font-weight:bold">Session 7.A</span></td>
    <td class="tg-0lax"><span style="font-weight:bold">Session 7.B</span></td>
  </tr>
  <tr>
    <td class="tg-0lax">11:00 - 11:20</td>
    <td class="tg-0lax">{23}</td>
    <td class="tg-0lax">{13}</td>
  </tr>
  <tr>
    <td class="tg-0lax">11:20 - 11:40</td>
    <td class="tg-0lax">{40}</td>
    <td class="tg-0lax">{17}</td>
  </tr>
  <tr>
    <td class="tg-0lax">11:40 - 12:00</td>
    <td class="tg-0lax">{71}</td>
    <td class="tg-0lax">{64}</td>
  </tr>
  <tr>
    <td class="tg-0lax"><span style="font-weight:normal">11:00 - 12:20</span></td>
    <td class="tg-0lax" colspan="2"><span style="font-weight:normal">Short break</span></td>
  </tr>
  <tr>
    <td class="tg-0lax"></td>
    <td class="tg-0lax"><span style="font-weight:bold">Session 8.A</span></td>
    <td class="tg-0lax"><span style="font-weight:bold">Session 8.B</span></td>
  </tr>
  <tr>
    <td class="tg-0lax">12:20 - 12:40</td>
    <td class="tg-0lax">{36}</td>
    <td class="tg-0lax">{14}</td>
  </tr>
  <tr>
    <td class="tg-0lax">12:40 - 13:00</td>
    <td class="tg-0lax">{61}</td>
    <td class="tg-0lax">{28}</td>
  </tr>
  <tr>
    <td class="tg-0lax"><span style="font-weight:normal">13:00 - 13:10</span></td>
    <td class="tg-0lax" colspan="2"><span style="font-weight:normal">Farewell</span></td>
  </tr>
</tbody></table>
`

cambia = function(day){

  let daynew = day
  listaid.forEach(id => {
  //const did = dataf.filter(d => d.id == id)
  // monday = monday.replace("{"+id+"}", muestra(did))//`<a href="#${id}">${did.Title}</a>`)
  const did = dataf.find(d => d.id == id)
  if (!isEmptyOrSpaces(did.abstract)){
    daynew = daynew.replace("{"+id+"}", `${did.Authors}, <a href="#${id}"><em>${did.Title}</em></a>`)
  }else{
    daynew = daynew.replace("{"+id+"}", `${did.Authors}, <em>${did.Title}</em>`)
  }
})
return daynew
}


```


## Programme 

### Monday, 29 June 2026

```{ojs}
//| echo: false
html`${cambia(monday)}`
```

### Tuesday, 30 June 2026

```{ojs}
//| echo: false
html`${cambia(tuesday)}`
```


### Wednesday, 1 July 2026

```{ojs}
//| echo: false
html`${cambia(wednesday)}`
```


## Plenary Talks

```{ojs}
//| echo: false
datai=dataf.filter(d => d.type == "I").sort((a, b) => a.Apellidos.localeCompare(b.Apellidos))

html`${muestra_lista(datai)}`

//muestra_lista(datai)
```


## Talks

```{ojs}
//| echo: false
datat=dataf.filter(d => d.type == "T").sort((a, b) => a.Apellidos.localeCompare(b.Apellidos))

html`${muestra_lista(datat)}`
```


## Posters

```{ojs}
//| echo: false
datap=dataf.filter(d => d.type == "P").sort((a, b) => a.Apellidos.localeCompare(b.Apellidos))

html`${muestra_lista(datap)}`

```
